ResearchProjectDef.label: abyssal signal theory
ResearchProjectDef.description: Controlled interaction with extra-dimensional hostile signatures through machine-assisted ritual geometry. Unlocks the Abyssal Forge, the Abyssal Summoning Circle, residue condensation, and the first sigil-production loop.

ResearchProjectDef.label: abyssal armaments
ResearchProjectDef.description: Weaponized containment of breach-energy refined after first-contact ritual production.

ResearchProjectDef.label: abyssal augmentation
ResearchProjectDef.description: Military infernal augmentation theory built around controlled abyssal materials and future boss-derived implants.
